items.title: Lamine Yamal vs. Lionel Messi As Spain-Argentina Set Up World Cup Final
items.summary: It is a clash between two elite national teams led by generational superstars for the World Cup title.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: 'Passive' and 'crumbled' - did Tuchel's defensive tactics cost England?
items.summary: England went 1-0 up against Argentina before slumping to a heart-breaking semi-final defeat. But did boss Thomas Tuchel's "negative" tactics cost the Three Lions a place in the...
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Moises Henriques announces retirement from Australian domestic cricket
items.summary: Most capped BBL player in history retires from domestic cricket in Australia and is set to play for Portugal
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
